target: 17. Hope
As for how Shide and the others will appear…

Shide said that he has my power,
the ability to observe parallel worlds.
Parallel worlds?

If a time traveler goes back in time and changes the future,
the timeline branches out…

Creating another world that runs parallel to
the one the traveler came from…
That's the idea.

So there are two worlds - 
one where me and Mio died, and one where we survived?

Yeah.
And parallel worlds number infinitely based on possibilities.

So if Shinpei dies, 
the world gets "copied" multiple times,
and only one consciousness moves to a new version…

Meaning the previous world
ceases to exist entirely.

Normally, infinite parallel worlds would exist,
but all of them disappear except for the one with Shinpei's consciousness…

…I get that part.
But what about Ushio?
Why do we know she'll appear?!

Yes…
We're calling the initial state of Ushio who appears on July 24th "Ushio."

Ushio was first encountered
on the third loop's festival day.
After that, due to the massacre,
I got stuck in a time loop--

For some reason, she followed me,
coming into the fourth world with both her consciousness and physical form.

I see…
There should have already been a Ushio in the fourth-world
when the third-world's Ushio arrived as well…
At that point, there were two shadows of Ushio.

That's right.
And as for the current state on July 24th at 5 AM--

He should be drifting somewhere in the sea,
gradually recovering from the damage he received from Heine.

That's the injury he took
while trying to protect Shiori during the beach bath…
Damn it!

If Ushio is like me and Heine,
she should be moving her consciousness alone 
to herself drifting in the sea when she loops--
But that's not happening.

So this world has 
the Ushio from the ninth loop drifting in the sea--

And also this shell--which is
"Ushio" from the third-loop that came with me,
existing simultaneously.

This means we should assume 
Heine and Shinpei have the same idea…
Ushio read Shide’s mind before vanishing—'He’ll appear 24th.' They wagered all on it… I think that’s how it went.
That's why I believe so…

Hey, wait!
This is just an assumption on top of another.
It's nothing but a "wish."

We've only now reached the 24th
since the loop with Ushio began.
No one can be sure…
But Ushio should have known for certain.
Why are you so confident?

Until just now, it was a wish…
But I'm certain now.
Please look at this…

Oh!
The shell is moving…??

No matter where I put this shell,
it moves slightly toward the south.

Since when?!
This is…

It moved most clearly around 3 AM,
but it's weakened a lot now.
High tide…!!!

Yes!
To be washed ashore at Omoto Beach facing south,
a current from the south to north is needed.

Because of the moon's gravity, seawater in
the Inland Sea flows into and out of straits…

During high tide when Ushio comes,
it'll have that exact current direction.

I see…!
So Ushio is currently in the Kii Channel
rather than Osaka Bay or Inland Sea…

Exactly.
This shell reacts to Ushio!!!
She was nearby just now…

Low tide and high tide happen twice a day!
The second high tide should be around 6 PM!!!

At that time, 
Ushio will come closer to the island again!!

Yes!!!
I met Ushio after 8 AM,
but she must have washed up before then!

From Shide's perspective, 
the threat of the tide could double…

This uncertainty can't be ignored.
They'll probably come here with all their might!!!

But they don't know Ushio's exact location,
so I'm sure they're half-believing he'll appear…

Heine said that because Ushio is glitchy, 
she can't sense her presence.

But we have certainty!!!
This difference will be our chance!

If we miss this opportunity,
we'll completely lose Ushio.
Let's go meet her!
Yeah!!!
It seems like hope is appearing…
Alright!

Then everyone, 
please follow the plan from now on!!!
Hello… Shinpei?

Koyumiba-san? 
I need a favor…
